# Product Experience Mechanisms

## Public Inspection

The system promises that a guest can inspect a public item without account creation. The item identity remains visible during loading and recovery.

## Failure And Recovery

When detail loading fails, preserve the selected item, explain the failure in user language, and offer retry. Retry must restore the same detail rather than redirecting home.

## Shared-Link Entry

A shared link resolves to the same inspectable detail. Invalid or expired links explain the boundary and provide a route to public home.

## Trust Controls

No hidden write, billing, personalization, or persistent memory occurs in the P0 guest flow.
